stemHtml: In the northern hemisphere, during periods of prolonged cloudless skies over land, associated with anticyclonic conditions, the…

options.a: angle between isobars and surface wind direction tends to be greatest in the mid afternoon.
options.b: wind tends to back from early morning until early afternoon.
options.c: surface wind speed tends to be highest at night.
options.d: surface wind speed tends to be highest during the mid afternoon.
